name: Chorus Shapeshifter SX 16mm
description: The Chorus Shapeshifter SX 16mm is the widebody all-court variant in the Shapeshifter series, built around a unique three-layer face stack: a top sheet of 3D 18K cubic carbon fiber in a triaxial weave for grip and durability, a Toray T700 carbon middle layer for stiffness, and a fiberglass backing layer for energy return. The unibody mold uses denser foam around the perimeter to widen the sweet spot relative to traditional edge-guarded builds. The 16 mm Power Polymer core balances the soft touch of a control paddle with the responsive snap of a thinner power build.

specifications.face_material: 3D 18K cubic carbon fiber (triaxial weave) over Toray T700 carbon and fiberglass backing

care_instructions: The 3D cubic carbon face is durable but its texture is what generates spin — clean with a damp microfiber, avoid abrasive cleaners. The foam perimeter widens the sweet spot but softens above 130°F, so do not leave the paddle in a hot car. Store in a sleeve when not in use.
